title: Decadent Tangy Kenyan Tofu Skewers
description: A tangy and indulgent Kenyan dish featuring parsley and miso-marinated tofu, perfect for a vegan-friendly dinner option.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the tofu cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the miso marinade.
Thread the marinated tofu cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
While the tofu is baking, mix the chopped parsley with a squeeze of lemon juice.
After 20 minutes, remove the skewers from the oven and brush with the parsley mixture.
Return the skewers to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and serve hot.
